overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing a sun-drenched tropical cyberpunk shantytown market, crossing a palm-tree-lined plaza with wrecked vehicles, and entering the neon-lit Grand Imperial Mall. The environment blends futuristic architecture with makeshift structures under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction checkpoint leading to outdoor market

events.description: moving from yellow barrier construction zone into populated market area with stalls
character accelerates from walking to running speed through market entrance

agents.ego_description: running past concrete barriers and checkpoints toward a crowded market street with makeshift stalls

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing watch near concrete wall structure
merchant standing beside wooden market stall

entered.detail: bright yellow plastic barriers blocking off construction area
tall weathered concrete wall with metal fencing
colorful canvas awning over wooden market structure
dense web of electrical cables crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens near yellow construction barriers in a sunlit urban area. The character runs past concrete checkpoint walls toward a bustling market entrance, passing an armed guard and a merchant by their stall. Overhead power lines crisscross the bright blue sky as the density of makeshift structures increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded outdoor market bazaar with makeshift stalls

events.description: crowd density increases significantly as character enters central market area
approaching the exit of the market into a covered walkway structure

agents.ego_description: sprinting through narrow market lanes between corrugated metal shacks and canvas stalls, weaving through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking directly toward camera in the narrow path
shirtless man with tattoos leaning against a metal stall

entered.detail: rusty corrugated iron structure serving as market stall
crude wooden planks forming vendor booth with red awning
dark metal-roofed passage leading out of the market

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a dense market shantytown with corrugated metal shacks and wooden stalls lining a dirt path. The space is narrow and shaded by canvas awnings and overhead wires. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including a shirtless man leaning against a stall, as the character approaches a covered walkway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and scattered wreckage

events.description: exiting the covered market walkway into bright open plaza with palm trees
character slows slightly while crossing the open plaza toward distant buildings

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered market into a sunlit plaza lined with palm trees, passing wrecked vehicles and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near a wrecked yellow vehicle
two figures walking along the edge of a large building

entered.detail: tall palm trees casting long shadows across the concrete
abandoned and damaged cars scattered across the plaza
futuristic skyscraper with reflective glass facade in the distance
large concrete overpass with teal structural elements

segments.scene_description: The character bursts from the covered market into a wide sunlit plaza filled with palm trees and wrecked vehicles. Modern glass towers and an elevated highway structure dominate the background. The space opens up dramatically from the narrow market, with only a few scattered pedestrians visible near the abandoned cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to grand mall entrance with neon accents

events.description: approaching the imposing pink neon-lit entrance of The Grand Imperial Mall
entering the shadow cast by the tall mall structure, pink neon becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking toward the grand entrance between two curved walls illuminated by pink neon strips, passing wrecked cars

notable_agents.action: woman in purple outfit leaning against the curved neon wall smoking
silhouetted figure walking ahead into the dark corridor entrance

entered.detail: massive curved building facade with horizontal pink neon lighting strips
narrow passage between two curved walls with vertical pink neon strips
illuminated sign reading 'The Grand Imperial Mall' above the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches The Grand Imperial Mall, a massive structure with distinctive curved walls lined with pink neon strips. The environment shifts from open plaza to the building's entrance corridor, passing a woman smoking against the wall and wrecked cars. The signage becomes visible at the corridor's end as natural light gives way to artificial neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit entrance corridor transitioning to mall interior atrium

events.description: dramatic shift from bright sunlight to dark interior with pink and red neon lighting
emerging from narrow corridor into larger interior mall atrium with red ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow pink-lit corridor into the darker mall interior, passing seated figures and indoor vegetation

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench against the corridor wall
distant figure visible in the red-lit atrium ahead

entered.detail: large open interior space with red and purple ambient lighting
palm trees and vegetation planted in raised beds inside the mall
long red fluorescent lights running along the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the narrow entrance corridor with intense pink neon lighting, transitioning into the dark interior of the mall. The space opens into a red-lit atrium with indoor palm trees and scattered debris. The dramatic lighting shift from bright tropical sun to moody artificial neon marks the transition from outdoor plaza to indoor commercial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright urban checkpoint through a claustrophobic shantytown market and into a wide, sun-drenched plaza. It begins near yellow construction barriers and concrete walls, moving past an armed guard and merchants as the density of makeshift structures increases under a bright blue sky. As the character enters the market, the environment shifts into a narrow dirt path shaded by canvas awnings and corrugated metal shacks, where pedestrians navigate the tight space between wooden stalls. The scene then opens up dramatically as the character bursts from the covered walkway into a sprawling plaza filled with palm trees and wrecked vehicles. Finally, the view expands to reveal modern glass towers and an elevated highway dominating the horizon under the clear sunlight.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched outdoor plaza into the moody, neon-lit depths of a futuristic shopping center. It begins as the character approaches the massive curved walls of The Grand Imperial Mall, passing wrecked cars and a woman smoking against a wall while moving toward the entrance corridor. As the camera advances, the bright tropical sunlight gradually fades, replaced by the intense glow of pink neon strips that line the narrowing passage. The scene then shifts from the corridor into the dark interior of the mall, where the space opens into a vast, red-lit atrium. Finally, the environment settles into a dramatic indoor landscape characterized by scattered debris and indoor palm trees under a heavy artificial haze.
